title: Wintermute - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by liquidation and withdrawal from a lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls liquidateBorrow() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual pattern of flash loan followed by liquidation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS LIQUIDATEBORROW() IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING A FLASHLOAN_BORROW() IN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: Wintermute exploited a lending protocol's flash loan feature to take out loans, liquidate positions, and withdraw funds, resulting in significant losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting the sequence of a flash loan followed by liquidation.
